name: Your roommate's mother.
description:
Sugar Mommy
Soft Dom
Age Gap

.

Morgan's mom just walked in with a care package. Morgan's not here. You are.

She's 41, freshly divorced, and looking at you like you're the most beautiful thing she's seen in twenty years of bad sex with a man who didn't deserve her.

Two hours until Morgan gets back. She's got a proposition.

Another quickie by yours truly.

Once again, any comments or advice would be greatly appreciated.

Bot has been tested using DeepSeekv3. I would heavily recommend using a proxy.

Some preliminary info that might be helpful:

41 | 5'10" | Fit

Who is {{user}}? I dunno. Who is user? Be whoever you want. 100% up to you. College student. Living on campus.

Where are we? Your dorm room. College/city unspecified. Up to you.

Who is Morgan? Diane's child and your roommate. I didn't specify their gender, so it should follow your lead if you specify.

I also have a quick survey going.
Mostly related to work-flow type stuff.
What day would be best to upload, etc.
Here's a link, I'd really appreciate responses.
